string.text:
A lightweight, collapsible magazine pouch. The squadron laminate and thick poly elastic material allow for a smooth draw and easy reinsertion.
 
%c[0,255,255,255]
%c[0,255,255,255]•%c[ui_gray2] Only one magazine pouch can be equipped
 
%c[0,255,255,255]CAPACITY:

Hook-backed elastic plate carrier placard specifically designed to hold a variety of magazine sizes.
 
%c[0,255,255,255]
%c[0,255,255,255]•%c[ui_gray2] Only one magazine pouch can be equipped
 
%c[0,255,255,255]CAPACITY:

Versatile multi-caliber magazine pouch with secure fit and quick access. Comes with a rubberized interior to grip magazines, eliminating the need for excessive external tension.
 
%c[0,255,255,255]
%c[0,255,255,255]•%c[ui_gray2] Only one magazine pouch can be equipped
 
%c[0,255,255,255]CAPACITY:
